residual_risks.risk: Pre-existing test-patterns.md violation in story-e11-s03.spec.ts: makeSession factory uses new Date() directly (lines 23-24) instead of test-time utilities. Not a regression — those lines are unmodified by this diff.

Pre-existing silent catch in pomodoroPreferences.ts: getPomodoroPreferences() at line 36 and savePomodoroPreferences() at line 46 both have bare catch blocks without visible user feedback. Not a regression — those catch blocks are unmodified by this diff.

testing_gaps.gap: No E2E test validates that the auto-advance countdown is gated on the autoPlay preference in a real browser. The new unit test covers this, but there is no integration/E2E coverage for the full completion flow with autoPlay toggled off.
